name: Go Green Global Technologies Corp.
business: The company is a development-stage company planning to enter the airline safety industry by developing a Runway Monitoring System to detect Foreign Object Debris (FOD) at airports.

exposures.sentence: It is easily installed and may consists of: A high definition video or infrared imaging system An image processing ground station Existing airport runway lighting and power technology The alert system may provide virtually instantaneous notification of any runway FOD.

At Secure Runway System Corp. we are developing the "Runway Monitoring System" which will be a cost-effective runway-monitoring tool that can be used at any airport to alert ground, tower and/or flight crew to the presence of FOD on the runway.
We are a development-stage company planning to enter into the airline safety industry.

catalysts.event: Seek financing through private placements or convertible debentures
catalysts.sentence: Over the next 90 days the Company intends to seek financing through private placements or convertible debentures.
During the next twelve months we plan to continue to define our business plan, create our website and acquire technologies that will allow us to produce our working prototype within 270 days.

catalysts.event: File for product certifications with Transport Canada and NTSB
catalysts.sentence: we expect to file for certifications with 300 days and we anticipate certification to take 10 to 14 months, the Company anticipates the cost of certification to be twenty five thousand dollars.

tamClaims.claim: Foreign Object Debris (FOD) costs the aerospace industry $4 billion a year.
tamClaims.sentence: The resulting damage is estimated to cost the aerospace industry $4 billion a year.
